name: agents.delegate
description: Delegate a subtask to another agent. Creates a child run assigned to the target agent. Can optionally wait for completion (blocking) or return immediately with the delegated run ID for async tracking.

agent_id.description: Target agent ID to delegate to (e.g., 'compliance', 'security', 'engineering')

subtask.description: Description of the subtask to delegate

context.description: Context to pass to the delegated agent

constraints.description: Constraints or requirements for the subtask

behaviors_required.description: Specific behaviors the delegated agent should follow

run_id.description: Current run ID (auto-filled if executing within a run context)

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the delegated subtask

wait_for_completion.description: If true, block until the delegated subtask completes. If false, return immediately with delegated_run_id.

delegated_run_id.description: Run ID created for the delegated subtask

parent_run_id.description: The originating run that requested delegation

target_agent_id.description: Agent ID handling the delegated subtask

result.description: Output from the delegated run (present if completed)

error.description: Error message if the delegation failed

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when delegation was created

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when delegation completed (if applicable)
